name: pipeline-coordination
description: Coordinated Pipeline Execution: a self-contained delegation layer for running multi-stream work across sessions. One setup skill bootstraps a project's coordination meta-plan, drafts the first handoff, and installs the handoff-handling overlays. Three roles (orchestrator plans, coordinator runs a slice, workers build) communicate through a lean handoff contract.

install_targets.overlays: installed at runtime by /meta-plan-init into ~/.claude/skills/create-note/LOCAL.md and ~/.claude/skills/pickup/LOCAL.md (check-then-write; uninstall = delete)

notes: Overlays and templates ship INSIDE skills/meta-plan-init/ (overlays/, templates/) so the setup skill is self-contained and runs on a clean machine before any other component loads. The meta-coordinator skill ships SKILL.md only; its LOCAL.md is an installation-private overlay the operator authors, never distributed. Deferred to v1.1+ (not in this bundle): auto-detectors, the /validate-artifact N-agent team, the communication-contract release gate.
